situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 6 protocol runs completed (Runs #1–#6) since gap broken on 2026-05-03 (182 days off). Run #6 (May 31) shortened to 3.78 km; first successful 5 km consolidation was Run #5 (May 23). Unplanned 1.25 km run to RER this morning (non-protocol). VO2max running improving: 38.3→39.6. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on sur-site days (~38 km RT). Chronic load declining: 22.3→15.28 over 19 days — training status DETRAINING. ACWR 0.687 (below 0.8 lower bound) driven by sparse activity in late May. Weight continuing downward: 104.1→102.97 kg. Two sur-site days ahead (Thu 4 + Fri 5 Jun) will contribute commute load. HRV stable BALANCED (weekly avg 36). Baby (Léonie, 5 months) sleep currently stable — not disrupting recovery. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Execute Run #7 tomorrow (Wed) if zero post-Run #6 pain at 48h+. Today's 1.25 km mini-run was non-protocol and does not reset the 48h inter-run gap (only 8.6 min, suffer 8). Target 5 km at ≤137 bpm avg HR. This is consolidation run #2 at the 5 km plateau — need 2 consecutive clean 5 km runs to validate the distance step.
recommendations.measurable: Run #7 completed at 5 km with avg HR ≤140 bpm and no pain during or 24h post

recommendations.text: Arrest the detraining slide — acute load (10.5) and chronic load (15.28) have both declined ~30% since May 14. Commit to minimum 3 sessions this week. The commute days (Thu/Fri) count as passive load contribution. Do not skip the Saturday gravel and Sunday run unless readiness or weather forces it.
recommendations.measurable: Acute load ≥12.0 by end of week; chronic load stabilised or beginning to uptick by Jun 9

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein toward 150g target. Last 7d average was ~115g — 24% below target. At 103 kg body weight in a comeback phase, protein supports both tendon remodeling and lean mass preservation during the ongoing weight cut. Target ≥30g protein at each of 3 main meals plus a post-training snack.

markers_to_watch.reason: Below lower bound of healthy ACWR band; indicates detraining. Load needs gradual rebuilding.
